description: On-brand weekly performance deck published as dated app routes that accumulate over time. Reads the workspace's paid-strategy briefs and brand kit, runs creative-deep-dive on qualifying creatives, frames every slide against last week's deck so the narrative compounds, posts the share URL to configured Slack channels.

installs.purpose: Deck skill — reads strategy briefs + brand kit + last week's snapshot, runs deep dives, renders dated HTML route, posts share URL to Slack
Local routing index for accumulated decks
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the weekly-deck library

post_install.name: Create the deck app for this workspace
post_install.description: Creates the sandbox app at /agent/apps/weekly-performance-deck-<workspace-slug>/ that hosts the dated routes

post_install.name: Build the empty deck app shell
post_install.description: Initial build so the route base is live and reachable

post_install.name: Schedule the Friday deck
post_install.description: every friday at 14:00 <workspace timezone> — generate and post the weekly deck. Resolved from /agent/.runtime/timezone at install time.

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial release. Single- and multi-channel deck layouts (merged-stages default, channel-separated-stages alternate). Per-funnel-stage repeating block: stage overview, new launches and active tests, deep dives, recommendations. Dated routes accumulate — previous Fridays remain at their original URLs. Reads last week's snapshot before drafting and classifies every item as stable/changed/new/resolved. Composes creative-deep-dive outputs in single-creative and test-set modes. Brand-styled rendering using brand-kit tokens over Motion design system shells. Slack post to configured channels with absolute share URL and optional user tags.
